title: YTP: Legend of Zelda: The Farting King
description:
The King tries to explain a serious situation, but can't control his overwhelming urges to release explosive farts.

Suddenly a bunch of dancing badgers appear and manipulate the characters, forcing them to dance... like badgers.

As the mood finally gets serious, Gwonam's porn stash finds itself in the wrong place at the wrong time, leading to an unbelievably awkward moment.
